response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems knowledge, and notable open-source contributions, but lacks clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy in AI-driven engineering environments, has a recent career gap, and minimal demonstrated experience with Python or operational ownership in high-throughput distributed systems — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-performance architectures (DLang, microservices, real-time data)
Proven track record in developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators at re:cinq)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership via workshops, frameworks, and community projects
concerns: Career gap since October 2025 raises questions about current engagement and momentum
No explicit experience with Python or direct ownership of AI-native code production pipelines
Limited evidence of scaling technical strategy across teams or owning on-call incident response at staff level
